title: Integration, Accumulation, and Continuous Models · Quantity Clinic: Riemann Accumulation
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving accumulated flow and exposure. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math adv riemann accumulation increment in a reproducible integral calculus computational study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate riemann accumulation in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Communicate optimization calculus in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
